sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33145" key="e)kfantiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκφαντ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐκφαντορικός</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> </bibl> <sense id="n33145.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in Alc.Praef.</tr_> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
